description: Music & song integration for Level 0. Songs chosen for: slow tempo, clear pronunciation, simple vocabulary, repetitive structure. Learning method: listen with lyrics → shadow chorus → learn 5 items.

method.step_1: Listen to the full song once (just enjoy)
method.step_2: Read the lyrics while listening (connect sound to text)
method.step_4: Shadow the chorus 5 times (match rhythm and pronunciation)
method.step_5: Write 2 sentences using words from the song

weekly_songs.why: Simple greetings vocabulary. 'Hello' and 'goodbye' repeated. Slow, clear.

weekly_songs.search: Bruno Mars Count on Me lyrics
weekly_songs.why: Numbers theme. Slow tempo. Clear pronunciation. Friendship vocabulary.

weekly_songs.search: Bill Withers Lean on Me lyrics
weekly_songs.why: Family/support theme. Very slow. Clear words. Emotional vocabulary.
Home/daily life theme. Describes a house and routine. Fun rhythm.
Food vocabulary. Fun and energetic. Lists many foods.

weekly_songs.search: I Can See Clearly Now lyrics
weekly_songs.why: Can/ability theme. Slow, clear. Positive emotions. Simple vocabulary.
Past tense introduction. Very slow. Clear words. Emotional. Perfect for Week 8 grammar.

bonus_songs.why: Very slow. Simple vocabulary. Good for dreaming/wishing (I want to...).
Slow. Describes the world. Colors, nature, people. Beautiful for L0.
Very repetitive. 'Don't worry' repeated. Positive. Clear Caribbean English.
Extremely simple. You/my/make/happy. Perfect for absolute beginners.
Slow, clear, repetitive. Good for practicing connected speech.

integration_with_daily_tasks: One song per week. Listen Monday, shadow chorus Tuesday-Wednesday, learn words Thursday, write sentences Friday. Weekend: choose any song and enjoy it.
